perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a POV shot showing a vast, snowy ski slope with a wooden building and a large lake in the background under a bright sky. (2) The camera pans backwards to reveal the main character, a woman in a yellow snowboarding jacket and white helmet, as she snowboards downhill. Two other snowboarders are visible in the background. (3) She continues to snowboard while holding the camera, looking back at it and then toward the path. (4) Suddenly, she loses balance, the camera tilts wildly toward the sky and then into the snow, ending with a close-up of her face covered in snow as she laughs.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Heavy wind noise and the distinct scraping sound of a snowboard on packed snow dominate the audio. A female voice speaks in Mandarin, excitedly challenging viewers to see how shaky the filming is while snowboarding. (2) The sound of wind and snow continues at a steady pace. (3) A sudden loud 'Ah!' is heard, followed by a soft thud and the muffled sound of impact with snow. (4) The video concludes with the sounds of the woman laughing and catching her breath.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：當你以為邊滑雪邊自拍很簡單' (POV: When you think it's easy to take a selfie while skiing) is displayed as a hook at the top of the screen throughout the video. It carries a humorous and relatable tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: POV Downhill Ride -> Selfie Snowboarding -> Sudden Fall into Snow

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 other snowboarders visible in the background during the ride.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman wearing a bright yellow snowboarding jacket with white zippers, a white helmet, and blue-mirrored snowboarding goggles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A wide-open snowy mountainside overlooking a partially frozen lake. Some bare winter trees and a power line tower are visible in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain by showcasing a humorous 'expectation vs. reality' moment during winter sports. It uses the POV perspective to immerse the viewer in the action before delivering a comedic payoff when the creator falls while trying to maintain the selfie.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is wearing prominent sports gear with a visible brand logo (Oakley) during an aspirational lifestyle activity.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy outdoor sports vlog with a focus on 'behind the scenes' failure moments.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the popularity of snowboarding culture and the relatable struggle of capturing social media content during extreme activities.
